message:
Fix mobile rendering issues on projects page

- Fix SectionShell animation race condition that caused content to be
  invisible on initial render (opacity stuck at 0)
- Add CSS Motion Path support detection for FlowingParticle animations
  to gracefully degrade on mobile Safari < 15.4
- Ensure content is always visible by using initial={false} and
  style={{ opacity: 1 }} as fallback
- Add hasMounted state to prevent hydration mismatches

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
